headline: National Duals Invitational Announces 2026 Automatic Qualifications
summary: OKLAHOMA CITY, March 26, 2026--The National Duals Invitational, a groundbreaking $1 million collegiate wrestling event sponsored by Paycom, has announced the teams earning automatic qualification for the 2026 tournament. Featuring top programs from across the country, the tournament will bring elite competition and high-stakes prize money to Tulsa this December.

headline: Paycom Named 2026 Platinum Employer on Where You Work Matters List
summary: OKLAHOMA CITY, March 26, 2026--Paycom Software, Inc. (NYSE: PAYC) ("Paycom"), a leading provider of comprehensive, cloud-based human capital management software, has been recognized as a 2026 Platinum Employer on the inaugural Where You Work Matters List.
